author: François Chalifour
subject: chore(dependencies): Update client and helper (#2903)
body:
* chore: Update client and helper
* feat: Return promise in `searchFunction`
* test: Update tests with promisified search
* chore: Upgrade helper
This helper version makes `addAlgoliaAgent` and `clearCache` optional

* chore: Add lock file
* feat: Test if `addAlgoliaAgent` exists before calling it
* feat: Don't add `addAlgoliaAgent` to search function
* test: Update snapshot
* test: Remove `addAlgoliaAgent` to tests
* fix: ESlint rule in tests
* feat: Remove unnecessary ESlint rules
